_comment: Hostile LLM-response fixture for the end-to-end render smoke (Stage 3, rec 0b4878d6 / 260607_make_beta_summaries_reliable_and_human). Every banned class (ticket/issue ID, stage/phase ref, follow-up ref, commit-style prefix, engineering jargon, file path, SCREAMING_SNAKE code constant) is salted into both `area` and `change` across all three buckets, with one clean user-facing bullet per bucket. The pipeline (parseLlmResponseDetailed -> renderMarkdown / renderSlackPayload) MUST drop every hostile bullet and render only the clean copy. If a future render path reintroduces unfiltered text, the smoke fails.

what_youll_see.change: USER_MESSAGE_MAX_CHARS was raised so long requests are not truncated.
Setup now explains itself when it needs attention.

what_we_fixed.change: feat(safety): idempotent retry path is now parity-checked.
Files that failed to upload now retry quietly in the background.

worth_a_look.change: see post-beta-summary.ts for the rollout detail.
Results feel snappier during longer sessions.
